nodes.label: Auto-Deploy Pipeline (GitHub Actions + Watchtower)

nodes.label: PraxisAI Known Gaps and Risks
nodes.rationale: No message buffering causes duplicate responses; no RAG causes hallucinations; no error handling causes silent failures; dual DB (Supabase+Airtable) causes maintenance overhead.

nodes.label: Message Buffering Upgrade (Redis/Supabase)
nodes.rationale: Wait 5s pattern reduces LLM calls 30-40% and prevents spam perception when customers send multiple messages.

nodes.label: RAG Knowledge Base via pgvector
nodes.rationale: RAG reduces hallucination ~80% for FAQ-type business questions (prices, hours, policies) by grounding answers in indexed business documents.

nodes.label: 24h/2h Appointment Reminder Workflow
nodes.rationale: Automated reminders reduce no-show rate from 15-25% to ~7-12% (50% reduction), directly increasing revenue.

nodes.label: Reactivation Cron â€” 90 Day Dormant Customers
nodes.norm_label: reactivation cron a€” 90 day dormant customers

nodes.label: Multi-Tenant business_id Routing
nodes.rationale: Single webhook with phone_id lookup replaces per-customer workflow copies â€” essential for scaling from 1 to 50+ tenants.

nodes.label: Subagent Pattern â€” Router + Specialist Agents
nodes.rationale: Splitting monolithic agent into booking/FAQ/smalltalk/complaint agents saves ~50% tokens and reduces errors from bloated system prompts.
nodes.norm_label: subagent pattern a€” router + specialist agents

nodes.label: Plan-Based LLM Model Selection
nodes.rationale: Starter uses Groq Llama (cheap), Professional uses GPT-4o-mini, Premium uses GPT-4o/Claude Sonnet â€” cost scales with plan tier.

nodes.label: Referrals Traefik Routing Config (deprecated)
nodes.rationale: Deprecated: referrals path routing moved from Traefik to n8n webhook for reliability and centralized traffic control.

nodes.label: Google Fonts Self-Hosting Task (DSGVO compliance)
nodes.rationale: Google Fonts CDN discloses user IP to Google servers, violating DSGVO. Self-hosting eliminates this data transfer.

nodes.label: Referral Upload n8n Workflow (VPS Storage)
nodes.rationale: Switched from Traefik routing to n8n webhook for photo serving â€” more reliable and provides centralized traffic control over referral images.

nodes.label: AI Vision Parse via OpenRouter/Gemini
nodes.rationale: Gemini chosen for AI vision with Zero Retention policy to comply with GDPR for medical referral documents.

nodes.label: WhatsApp Bot Fitness Studio Landing Page
nodes.norm_label: whatsapp bot fitness studio landing page

nodes.label: YAPAMADIKLARIM - Unresolved Bugs and TODOs
nodes.rationale: Documents 6 complex UI/UX bugs in dashboard.js that could not be fully resolved: (1) autocomplete closure state isolation preventing new leads from appearing without page reload, (2) physio pricing calculation not persisting due to cache or sector check failures, (3) bkEnd auto-calculation via service duration with residual references causing silent nulls, (4) anamnese PDF print outputting wrong content (cache likely), (5) physio duration picker integration in booking modal, (6) Hausbesuch icon placement in small booking blocks. Root causes involve JS closure scoping, browser caching, and DOM element reference management.

nodes.label: Docker Compose VPS Stack (Traefik + n8n + calendar-api + Watchtower)
nodes.rationale: Traefik handles HTTPS termination and routing. n8n runs on its own subdomain, calendar-api routes are carved out by path prefix rules leaving n8n to handle /api/v1/* (REST API). Watchtower polls GHCR every 60s for calendar-api image updates while n8n stays on manual deployment to avoid workflow data loss on unplanned restarts.
nodes.norm_label: docker compose vps stack (traefik + n8n + calendar-api + watchtower)

nodes.label: Bug: Booking Modal - New Lead Not Auto-Selected After Save
nodes.rationale: Root cause: allLeads array lives in a closure inside initBkCustomerAutocomplete(), so after a new lead is saved, the closure's stale array doesn't include the new entry. Fix: lift allLeads to window/module scope (window.allLeadsBk), make loadLeads() externally callable, and call selectLead(newId) after push.
nodes.norm_label: bug: booking modal - new lead not auto-selected after save

nodes.label: Bug: Physio 5-Min Einheitspreis Auto-Calculation Not Working
nodes.rationale: Likely causes: browser cache serving stale dashboard.js, getSector() returning wrong value, or srvPhysioFields still hidden. Debug via network tab + console.log + window.calculatePhysioPrices() test.
nodes.norm_label: bug: physio 5-min einheitspreis auto-calculation not working

nodes.label: Bug: Booking Modal - Auto End Time (bkEnd Removal Residuals)
nodes.rationale: bkEnd input was removed from HTML but references remain scattered in dashboard.js (openBookingModal, prefillBookingModal, _bkModalState, bkMoveBtn). Silent null returns where bkEnd would have been used need full audit.
nodes.norm_label: bug: booking modal - auto end time (bkend removal residuals)

nodes.label: Bug: Anamnese PDF Print Shows Wrong Content
nodes.rationale: printAnamnese() function added and onclick updated to reference it, but user still sees old behavior. Browser cache is primary suspect. Verify via network tab that new dashboard.js version is loaded.
nodes.norm_label: bug: anamnese pdf print shows wrong content

nodes.label: Bug: Hausbesuch Icon Position in Booking Block
nodes.rationale: Icon overlaps text in small booking blocks (e.g. 15-min appointments). overflow:hidden clips the icon. Solution: hide icon below threshold height, or use border-left color coding instead.
nodes.norm_label: bug: hausbesuch icon position in booking block
